figures.label: Maneuver 1
figures.tts: Maneuver one. Update with BMFA Helicopter A certificate requirement.

figures.label: Maneuver 2
figures.tts: Maneuver two. Update with BMFA Helicopter A certificate requirement.

figures.label: Maneuver 3
figures.tts: Maneuver three. Update with BMFA Helicopter A certificate requirement.

figures.label: Hovering M
figures.tts: Perform the hovering M maneuver. Hover at eye level and trace the M pattern, without turning the helicopter.

figures.label: Top Hat
figures.tts: Perform the top hat maneuver. Hover forward 5 metres, climb 2 metres, cross in front of the pilot, descend 2 metres, then hover forward 5 metres to exit.

figures.label: Takeoff & Climb
figures.tts: Take off and climb at an angle greater than 45 degrees to a safe altitude. Transition to forward flight.

figures.label: Left Hand Circuit
figures.tts: Fly a left hand circuit. Longest legs must extend over at least 50 metres.

figures.label: Right Hand Circuit
figures.tts: Fly a right hand circuit. Longest legs must extend over at least 50 metres.

figures.label: Stall Turn
figures.tts: Perform a stall turn. Pull up to a near vertical climb. At the top, pivot 180 degrees about the vertical axis. Descend on the reciprocal heading.

figures.label: Nose-In Hover
figures.tts: Perform a 20-second nose-in hover, at between eye level and 3 metres height. Hold the model steady for at least 20 seconds.

figures.label: Double Stall Turn
figures.tts: Perform a double stall turn with opposite rotation. The second stall turn must be in the opposite direction to the first.

figures.label: 45° Approach & Land
figures.tts: Perform an approach at approximately 45 degrees to the vertical. Land within the pre-determined two metre square.
